name: rundflug-leitstand
description: Cloudflare-native start repository for the Rundflug-Leitstand.

scripts.dev: npm run build:web && concurrently --kill-others --names web,worker --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:web && npm run build:worker
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run requirements:verify
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file apps/worker/seed/demo.sql --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['apps/web/dist','apps/worker/dist']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})"
